mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PA_SUPERVISOR ps LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON ps.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID AND he.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO

SELECT PERSON_ID, EMP_ID, LOCAL_NAME, DEPT_NAME, EMP_OFFICE, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT ps.PERSON_ID, he.EMPID AS EMP_ID, he.LOCAL_NAME, hd.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME, he.EMP_OFFICE, TO_CHAR(ps.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATE_DATE, ps.CREATED_BY, ps.ACTIVITY, ps.ORDERNO FROM PA_SUPERVISOR ps LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON ps.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID AND he.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO
ORDER BY ps.ORDERNO ASC, ps.CREATE_DATE DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{length, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT ps.PERSON_ID, he.EMPID AS EMP_ID, he.LOCAL_NAME, hd.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME, he.EMP_OFFICE, TO_CHAR(ps.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATE_DATE, ps.CREATED_BY, ps.ACTIVITY, ps.ORDERNO FROM PA_SUPERVISOR ps LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON ps.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO WHERE ps.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PA_SUPERVISOR WHERE PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PA_SUPERVISOR WHERE PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
